text.title: strategy-analysis-future-state Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for strategy-analysis-future-state. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Every future-state goal MUST carry: metric, baseline, baseline_source, target, target_unit, and target_date. Goals without any of these fields MUST be rejected and returned for re-elicitation. Goals with target_date more than 3 years in the future MUST be flagged as potentially unfalsifiable.
rule.rationale: Future states fail most often because goals were never measurable. The measurability gate is the single highest-value quality check in strategy analysis; it prevents the gap analysis from being built on fiction.

rule.statement: Solution-shaped goals ("implement chatbot", "deploy ERP") MUST be recast as outcome goals ("self-serve resolution rate >= 40%", "month-end close in 3 business days"). The recast MUST be confirmed by the exec sponsor before the future state is locked.
rule.rationale: Solution-shaped future-state goals collapse the change-strategy option space before the gap analysis identifies which solutions would actually close the gap.
